title: Smartfren and subsidiary to sign syndicated loan agreement of IDR 10 trillion
body: PT Smartfren Telecom Tbk (FREN), one of the biggest telecommunication service providers in Indonesia, has signed a syndicated loan agreement with a subsidiary and several banks.

title: A year in the market, two stocks triumph
body: Stock performances of two out of three issuers debuting on Indonesia Stock Exchange on November 8, 2023, were seen improving as of last week (15/11).

title: Gajah Tunggal secures syndicated loan of IDR 4.4 trillion
body: PT Gajah Tunggal Tbk (GJTL), a tyre manufacturer known with brands like GT Radial and IRC, has signed a syndicated loan facility from several banks worth IDR 4.4 trillion.

title: Formosa Ingredient Factory to channel interim dividend of IDR 2.31 billion
body: PT Formosa Ingredient Factory Tbk (BOBA), a beverage ingredient manufacturer known with its brand Boba King, will distribute interim dividend of IDR 2.31 billion or IDR 2 per share.

title: Know more about Wamildan Tsani Panjaitan, Garuda Indonesia’s new CEO
body: The Ministry of State-Owned Enterprises (SOEs) has appointed Captain Wamildan Tsani Panjaitan as the President Director of PT Garuda Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (GIAA), replacing Irfan Setiaputra.

title: Smartfren and subsidiary to sign syndicated loan agreement of IDR 10 trillion
body: PT Smartfren Telecom Tbk (FREN), one of the biggest telecommunication service providers in Indonesia, has signed a syndicated loan agreement with a subsidiary and several banks.

title: A year in the market, two stocks triumph
body: Stock performances of two out of three issuers debuting on Indonesia Stock Exchange on November 8, 2023, were seen improving as of last week (15/11).

title: Gajah Tunggal secures syndicated loan of IDR 4.4 trillion
body: PT Gajah Tunggal Tbk (GJTL), a tyre manufacturer known with brands like GT Radial and IRC, has signed a syndicated loan facility from several banks worth IDR 4.4 trillion.

title: Formosa Ingredient Factory to channel interim dividend of IDR 2.31 billion
body: PT Formosa Ingredient Factory Tbk (BOBA), a beverage ingredient manufacturer known with its brand Boba King, will distribute interim dividend of IDR 2.31 billion or IDR 2 per share.

title: Know more about Wamildan Tsani Panjaitan, Garuda Indonesia’s new CEO
body: The Ministry of State-Owned Enterprises (SOEs) has appointed Captain Wamildan Tsani Panjaitan as the President Director of PT Garuda Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (GIAA), replacing Irfan Setiaputra.

title: Switching from coal to alternative fuels, Donny Arsal from SMGR receives Best CEO award
body: The initiative to process urban solid waste into Refuse Derived Fuel (RDF) to replace coal fuel succeeded in bringing the Best CEO award to Donny Arsal, President Director of PT Semen Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (SMGR).

title: Tempo and IDN Financials Award Andrianto Oetomo as The Best CEO
body: Tempo and IDN Financials have named Andrianto Oetomo, President Director of PT Dharma Satya Nugraha Tbk (DSNG), The Best CEO at the Top CEO Indonesia Awards 2024 in Bandung, Friday (15/11). He was awarded the title with a special mention for Utilizing Bio-CNG as an Alternative Energy Source to Diesel Fuel.

title: Bauxite Waste Innovation, Nicolas D. Kanter of Aneka Tambang Receives The Best CEO Award
body: Nicolas D. Kanter, President Director of PT Aneka Tambang Tbk (ANTM), was awarded The Best CEO by Tempo-IDNFinancials for his innovative approach in utilizing mining waste for various applications.

title: Sales Soar, Hongky Jeffry Nantung of DMAS Receives The Best CEO Award
body: Hongky Jeffry Nantung, President Director of PT Puradelta Lestari Tbk (DMAS), was awarded The Best CEO by Tempo-IDNFinancials during the Top CEO event held in Bandung.

title: Reduce Pesticides for Pest Control, Santosa Wins The Best CEO Title
body: Santosa, President Director of PT Astra Agro Lestari Tbk (AALI), a subsidiary of the Astra Group operating in the palm oil plantation industry, received The Best CEO with Special Mention: The Most Consistent Listed Company in Efforts to Reduce Pesticide in Pest Management at the Top CEO Indonesia Awards 2024

title: Strong Commitment to the Indofood Riset Nugraha Program, Anthoni Salim Awarded The Best CEO
body: Anthoni Salim, President Director of PT Indofood CBP Sukses Makmur Tbk (ICBP), was awarded The Best CEO with Special Mention: Outstanding Support for Student Academic Research through IRN at the Top CEO Indonesia Awards 2024

title: Bringing Indofood to the World, Anthoni Salim Named The Best CEO
body: Anthoni Salim, President Director of PT Indofood Sukses Makmur Tbk (INDF), was awarded The Best CEO with Special Mention: The Global Total Food Solution for his success in transforming INDF into not only a total food solution company but also a global enterprise.

title: Susanto Djaja Wins The Best CEO Award for Commitment to Enhancing Digital Literacy
body: Tempo-IDNFinancials has awarded The Best CEO to Susanto Djaja, President Director of PT Metrodata Electronics Tbk (MTDL), in recognition of his strong commitment to advancing digital literacy.

title: Promoting Social Loans with MUFG, Made Dewa Susila Wins The Best CEO Award
body: Made Dewa Susila, President Director of PT Adira Dinamika Multi Finance Tbk (ADMF), has been awarded The Best CEO with Special Mention: The First Financing Company to Provide Social Loan for MSMEs at the Top CEO Indonesia Awards 2024, hosted by Tempo-IDNFinancials

title: Transforming PIK 2, Sugianto Kusuma Named The Best CEO
body: Sugianto Kusuma, commonly known as Aguan, has been awarded The Best CEO with Special Mention: The Most Outstanding Township Development at the Top CEO Indonesia Awards 2024

title: Subakti Syukur of JSMR Receives The Best CEO Award from Tempo-IDNFinancials
body: Subakti Syukur, President Director of PT Jasa Marga (Persero) Tbk (JSMR), has been awarded The Best CEO at the Top CEO Awards event held on Friday, November 15, 2024, in Bandung.

title: Optimizing Local Raw Materials, David Hidayat of Sido Muncul Wins The Best CEO Award
body: David Hidayat, President Director of PT Industri Jamu dan Farmasi Sido Muncul Tbk (SIDO), has been awarded The Best CEO by Tempo-IDNFinancials.

title: International Transactions Soar, Busrul Iman of Bank Jatim Wins The Best CEO Award
body: Busrul Iman, President Director of PT Bank Pembangunan Daerah Jawa Timur Tbk (BJTM) or Bank Jatim, has been awarded The Best CEO for his success in boosting international banking transactions.

title: Consistent Double-Digit Growth Places Lani Darmawan Among The Best CEOs
body: Lani Darmawan, President Director of PT Bank CIMB Niaga Tbk (BNGA), has been named The Best CEO by Tempo-IDNFinancials, recognized for her leadership in consistently delivering double-digit performance growth.

title: Royke Tumilaar Wins "The Best CEO" Title for Advancing Financial Inclusion
body: Royke Tumilaar, President Director of PT Bank Negara Indonesia Tbk (BBNI) or BNI, has been awarded the The Best CEO with Special Mention: Strong Commitment in Promoting Financial Inclusion with 20 Million Accounts by Tempo-IDNFinancials at the 2024 Top CEO Awards Indonesia, held in Bandung on Friday (15/11).

title: Sunarso Recognized as The Best CEO for Expanding Sustainable Credit Portfolio
body: Sunarso, the President Director of PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI), has been named The Best CEO with Special Mention: Most Expansive Sustainable Financing Activities at the prestigious Top CEO Awards Indonesia 2024

title: Places Jahja Setiaadmadja Among The Best CEOs
body: Jahja Setiaadmadja, the CEO of PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BCA), has received the prestigious The Best CEO with Special Mention: Enormous Support for National Stunting Reduction Program award at the Top CEO Indonesia Awards 2024, held in Bandung this Friday (15/11) by Tempo-IDNFinancials.

title: Irfan Setiaputra Named Best CEO by Tempo and IDNFinancials
body: CEO of PT Garuda Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (GIAA), has been awarded "The Best CEO" with a special mention for "Inspirational Leadership in the Aviation Industry." The recognition was bestowed by Tempo and IDN Financials during the 2024 Top CEO Indonesia Awards

title: Tempo-IDN Financials Releases List of Top 51 CEOs for 2024
body: Tempo, in collaboration with IDN Financials, has unveiled the list of the Top 51 Best Chief Executive Officers (CEOs) during the Top CEO Indonesia Awards 2024, held at the Pullman Bandung Grand Central in West Java, on Friday, November 15, 2024.

title: Indal Alumunium Industry to inject subsidiary with IDR 102 billion for refinancing
body: PT Indal Aluminium Industry Tbk (INAI) has granted extra capital worth IDR 102 billion to one of its subsidiaries, PT Indalex.

title: Siauw Yunus now owns 5% of Jungle Series (JGLE) after purchasing 1.1 billion shares
body: On Friday, November 8, Siauw Yunus Subandi made the decision to invest in PT Graha Andrasentra Propertindo Tbk (JGLE), the company that runs the Jungle Series amusement park. This individual investor purchased over 1.16 billion shares of JGLE through PT RHB Sekuritas Indonesia and seven other securities firms, formally becoming a new shareholder with 5.18% ownership.

title: Foreign sell recorded higher, net foreign volume drops to -996.41 million shares
body: On Wednesday, November 13, foreign selling volume (4.68 billion shares) outpaced foreign buying volume (3.68 billion shares). This disparity caused the net foreign volume to fall to -996.41 million shares. One of the factors contributing to the high foreign sales volume was the sale of shares in the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), which reached 1.43 billion shares with a net volume of -382.57 million shares.

title: Foreign buy exceeds 5 billion shares, net foreign volume closed at 279 million shares
body: Stock buying activity by foreign investors on Tuesday, November 12, resulted in foreign buying volume reaching 5.65 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales volume stood at 5.37 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume ended at 279.49 million shares.

title: Petrosea to form new subsidiary in mining services industry
body: PT Petrosea Tbk (PTRO) has established another new subsidiary called PT Lintas Kelola Berlaba (LKB) through one of its existing subsidiaries, PT Petrosea Infrastruktur Nusantara (PIN).

title: Superkrane Mitra Utama to share interim dividend of IDR 320.3 billion
body: PT Superkrane Mitra Utama Tbk (SKRN), a company engaged in the construction equipment rental business, is planning an interim dividend distribution of IDR 320.3 billion.

title: Satu Visi Putra obtains extra credit limit from BCA of IDR 4 billion
body: PT Satu Visi Putra Tbk (VISI), a wholesale trading company for advertising and printing materials, has acquired extra credit facility from PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA) or BCA.

title: Waskita Beton Precast to convert debt to boost equity
body: PT Waskita Beton Precast Tbk (WSBP), a precast concrete manufacturer under PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WIKA), announces its plan to increase capital without pre-emptive rights, or private placement, of 178.54 million shares.

title: Profits skyrocketed to double digits, Citi's net profit reaches IDR 2.2 trillion as of September
body: Citibank N.A. Indonesia, or what is usually called Citi Indonesia, managed to record a net profit increase of 32% year-on-year (yoy) at the end of September 2024.

title: Petrosea will issue bonds and sukuk ijarah of IDR 1.5 trillion
body: PT Petrosea Tbk (PTRO), an issuer of coal and oil and gas mining support services, will issue bonds and sukuk ijarah with a total principal amount of IDR 1.5 trillion.

title: Sat Nusapersada secures US$ 53.5 million credit facility from Bank Mandiri
body: PT Sat Nusapersada Tbk (PTSN), a manufacturer of electronic equipment for a number of well-known brands, has obtained a credit facility worth US$ 53.5 million from PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI).
